action: Create a 100-word story in the following format: character 1 name character 1 dialogue. character 2 name their dialogue and repeat this format till the end of the story making the story engaging, profound, and pushing the limits of human psychology to keep the listener wanting more
fallback_action: If fails then create a 50 words story with only one character.

recipe.steps: Create a 100-word story with the given format and rules.
Save the created story in memory under key 'stories.current_story'.
Verify the completion of the action and include the persona name.
